title: Sweet Adventures
description: This is a minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric mod pack, designed for better playtime with you Gf/Bf. For the boys there is some Create to enjoy technical challenges and for the girls there is a lot animals, farming and designing mods to enjoy...
body:
### **This modpack is designed to enjoy minecraft more than ever.** 
My first idea about this came, when I wanted  to play with my girlfriend, but normal modpacks were too complicated for her.. So I designed this one. There is a lot of possibilites to explore, create, design, build and harvest with a plenty of mods... 
_I hope you enjoy this :)_
